name: Kui

skills.name: Ethereal Outburst
skills.description: Deals area damage upon taking heavy damage in a single hit or after dying.

skills.name: Mortals!
skills.description: Inflicts damage and slow on enemies in the target area.

skills.name: Join Me
skills.description: Throws his chain hook in the target direction, damaging the enemy and pulling them to him. Upon learning this skill, gains a passive effect that increases his Health on defeats and assists.

skills.name: Into the Void
skills.description: Deals damage multiple times and slows enemies within range. For heroes marked by Skill 2, the slow effect is upgraded to a stun.

tips: Kui is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.8% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Tranquility → Glacial Buckler → Frigid Charge → Succubus Cloak → Longnight Guardian.
Run Fate for stats that match Kui's Support kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Mortals! → Join Me → Into the Void → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
Kui excels into Cao Cao, Kaizer, Xiang Yu. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.

Kui is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Kui.

faqs.question: Is Kui good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Kui is Tier A Support with 49.8% win rate, 1.0% pick rate, and 0.4% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Kui build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Tranquility, Glacial Buckler, Frigid Charge, Succubus Cloak, Longnight Guardian. Run Fate arcana with Smite & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Kui?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying into Kui. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Kui completes core items. Kui struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Kui counter?
faqs.answer: Kui is strong into Cao Cao, Kaizer, Xiang Yu according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Kui when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Kui good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Kui is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Kui.

faqs.question: What lane should Kui play?
faqs.answer: Kui is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support, Mage). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Kui?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Smite & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Kui or Dolia — which is better?
faqs.answer: Kui vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Kui has +3.7% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Kui when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Kui?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 0.4% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Support.
